title: FDE Session Contract
description: Versioned Field-Driven-Elicitation (Facilitated Discovery Engine) build-session aggregate (Altitude-1). Runtime-neutral: carries no runtime-specific field; adapters translate at the boundary (ADR-007). Stable reason codes reference contracts/reason-code-registry.json. Real content P330 (execution-plan.md Wave 3 row P330); state vocabulary fixed by docs/architecture.md ADR-004 and execution-plan.md section 6.3.

schemaVersion.description: Independently versioned per ADR-004; a SIC/DTC format change does not force this to bump.

status.description: execution-plan.md section 6.3 construction state machine, verbatim order. No state may be inferred from tool success or a free-text reference.

consumerOntologyId.description: Present once the session has bound a target consumer Ontology; may be absent while status is FDE_OPEN and unbound.

rejected.description: Rejected/deferred hypotheses are preserved with provenance (ADR-004 Consequences), never deleted.

reasonCode.description: Stable code from contracts/reason-code-registry.json; expected context on any rejected:true turn.
